series_metadata.series_title: Licensed Nursing Home Adminstrators Ready to Exam Files
series_metadata.series_description: Within two years of an individual who wishes to become a licensed nursing home administrator completing all the requirements, only the transcripts, test scores, copy of Core Certificate, administrator-in-training last monthly report, all applications, the direct college letter as applicable, and any out-of-state endorsements would be kept in the file.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Licensed Nursing Home Administrator Ready Exam Files will be kept intact a period of date that applicant met all of requirements take examination and
